review_notes: Browser review 2026-05-28: 2FindLocal is a real local business directory. The homepage explicitly says you can submit your business listing for free and exposes a public Submit free listing / SUBMIT YOUR BUSINESS flow to https://www.2findlocal.com/Modules/Biz/bizPhoneLookup.php with a visible business phone lookup step to start listing creation. Keep approved as a directory target, but scope fit is local business directory rather than SaaS-specific.

HTTP review 2026-05-28: apitracker.io/mcp-servers currently returns 403 Forbidden and did not expose a public anonymous submission surface in this review pass. Keep out of automation until a manual authenticated or explicitly public add-server flow is verified.

Browser review 2026-05-28: Glama hosts a real MCP server registry, but the visible Add Server action opens a sign-up modal and requires account creation before any submission workflow. Reject for anonymous automation as auth-gated/manual flow.
